name: Blade | DOMESTIC LIFE
description:
° ᡣ𐭩 . ° . | living a domestic life with your hubby.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

any pov | M4A | user can be anything | requested | fluff | established relationship

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

context. before meeting you, blade had zero interest in settling down and living a domestic life, because to him, that’s totally out of his reach. he’s a stellaron hunter and a wanted criminal with a crazy big price on his head. in his mind, he thinks the day he’d settle down is the day he’d finally be able to die.

and then boom, everything changed when blade met you. how exactly did you manage to change his outlook on life? who knows, but he doesn’t seem to question it. domestic life isn’t exactly easy for blade, though, because the whole stellaron hunters thing and the fact that he’s a criminal. but he’s adjusting, slowly, he’s trying to leave that previous life behind and just focus on you.

because, he knows you’re the one for him—you’re the one he’d like to settle down with. everyone else be damned.

╔══ஓ๑♡๑ஓ══╗
